comment.body:
from now, i put a limit buy order.
I will take long only if 6037/35 zone hits. 2DTE 25delta call.
no other trades for today. 

Bcs if you turn my provided indicator on, you will see in 1h timeframe that this can mean revert back to 35
and this is what positioning also tells. 
this is still bullish for the overall trend, but market went up in three consecutive days. Also this is my donwisde mean reversion lvl
If you are unsecure about it, better wait for a better setup, or wait until the market gives it to you (like i do)... my opinion (no fin adv)

i see no other edge.
